title: Alternate 3D Trident
description: Give your Trident a different look!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uhZ91I31/images/67240e91e2755cc7263d610d379a3346261b34fb.png) Unfortunately, due to how the trident has been implemented into the game, the custom model **will not work without the mod** [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or Optifine The **vanilla texture has been changed** as well, but no new model without the aforementioned mods. Give your trident 3D flair! Resource pack contains only the trident textures, so it should work with any other resource pack as long as you make sure this is on top in the resource pack menu! Created for and tested with: **Minecraft 1.20.4** and **1.20.1** Could work for other versions, but that is technically not supported! ### **README** **The mod (EMF) needed to have this work on fabric is sometimes known to have issues related to invisible models, I unfortunately can't do much about it until it is fixed by the mod developers, sorry for the inconvenience** [https://github.com/Traben-0/Entity_Model_Features/issues/189](https://github.com/Traben-0/Entity_Model_Features/issues/189) anyway enjoy :] please report any issues you have on the discord! --- please do not redistribute without my consent (feel free to use in modrinth or curseforge modpacks though!)
if you make variations from this please credit me :]
